category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison.

title.en: China-to-India Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical electromedical device documentation against India CDSCO Medical Device Rules 2017 requirements — covering CDSCO classification (Classes A–D), QMS (ISO 13485), electrical safety (IS/IEC 60601-1, IEC 62304), clinical evidence, Indian Authorized Agent and Import Licence (Form MD-14/MD-15 via SUGAM), and labelling/UDI/language obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床医疗电气器械文件与印度CDSCO《2017年医疗器械规则》要求差距对照——涵盖CDSCO分类（A–D类）、质量管理体系（ISO 13485）、电气安全（IS/IEC 60601-1、IEC 62304）、临床证明、印度授权代理商与进口许可证（通过SUGAM提交MD-14/MD-15表格）以及标签/UDI/语言义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床醫療電氣器材文件與印度CDSCO《2017年醫療器械規則》要求差距對照——涵蓋CDSCO分類（A–D類）、品質管理系統（ISO 13485）、電氣安全（IS/IEC 60601-1、IEC 62304）、臨床證明、印度授權代理商與進口許可證（通過SUGAM提交MD-14/MD-15表格）以及標籤/UDI/語言義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CDSCO registration determination, import licence application, QMS audit result, clinical evaluation, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and manufacturers should verify current India CDSCO classification, import licence, Indian Authorized Agent, technical documentation, labelling, and post-market obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing on the Indian market. CDSCO requirements and the mandatory device registration rollout are subject to ongoing change — always check current CDSCO guidance on sugam.gov.in.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CDSCO注册裁定、进口许可申请、质量体系审核结果、临床评价、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和制造商在出货或向印度市场投放前，应与合格法规专业人士核验现行印度CDSCO分类、进口许可、印度授权代理商、技术文件、标签和上市后义务。CDSCO要求及强制器械注册推出持续变动——请务必在sugam.gov.in查阅最新CDSCO指南。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CDSCO註冊裁定、進口許可申請、品質系統審核結果、臨床評價、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和製造商在出貨或向印度市場投放前，應與合格法規專業人士核驗現行印度CDSCO分類、進口許可、印度授權代理商、技術文件、標籤和上市後義務。CDSCO要求及強制器械註冊推出持續變動——請務必在sugam.gov.in查閱最新CDSCO指南。

answer_first.en: Appointing an Indian Authorized Agent and obtaining a CDSCO Import Licence (Form MD-15 via MD-14 application on SUGAM) are the primary structural gaps versus NMPA; IS/IEC 60601-1 safety largely transfers from GB 9706.1-2020 given their common IEC 60601-1 Ed.3.1 parentage; ISO 13485 QMS aligns well; clinical evidence and English labelling (with IAA address) require India-specific adaptation.
answer_first.zh: 指定印度授权代理商并取得CDSCO进口许可证（通过SUGAM提交MD-14申请，签发MD-15）是相对NMPA的主要结构性差距；IS/IEC 60601-1安全要求因与GB 9706.1-2020共同源自IEC 60601-1第三版第一修正版而可基本转移；ISO 13485质量管理体系高度对齐；临床证明和英文标签（含IAA地址）需针对印度进行特定调整。
answer_first.zht: 指定印度授權代理商並取得CDSCO進口許可證（通過SUGAM提交MD-14申請，簽發MD-15）是相對NMPA的主要結構性差距；IS/IEC 60601-1安全要求因與GB 9706.1-2020共同源自IEC 60601-1第三版第一修正版而可基本轉移；ISO 13485品質管理系統高度對齊；臨床證明和英文標籤（含IAA地址）需針對印度進行特定調整。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, harmonized-standard source, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
